svg.text: 4 comparators x (INV1_P + INV1_N + FB_NFET + INV2_P + INV2_N) = 20 MOSFETs
Each: tap -> INV1(Schmitt) -> INV2(buffer) -> comp | Hysteresis: 224-244 mV via feedback NFET
All comparators use PVDD-powered CMOS inverters with Schmitt trigger feedback NFETs.
Feedback NFET (long L=100um) pulls c_inv LOW when comp=HIGH, raising effective falling trip -> hysteresis.
Measured: TH1=2.51V TH2=4.16V TH3=4.44V TH4=5.52V | Hysteresis: 224-244 mV | 16/16 PASS
Block 08 Sub-2: Comparators -- Analog AI Chips PVDD LDO Regulator
